channel.title: Python on Cringe Live
channel.description: Recent content in Python on Cringe Live

item.title: Convert Date to UNIX Timestamp
item.description: Convert Date to UNIX Timestamp # """ This script converts a given date and time in the format of year, month, day, hour, and minute to a Unix timestamp. The Unix timestamp represents the number of seconds that have elapsed since January 1, 1970 (midnight UTC/GMT), not counting leap seconds. The script takes input from the command line, where the date and time components are expected to be provided in the following order: year, month, day, hour, minute.

item.title: Handy Notebook Snippets
item.description: Handy Notebook Snippets # Update PyTorch # # Uninstalls the specified Python packages (torch, torchaudio, torchvision, # torchtext, torchdata) if they are already installed in your Python # environment. # The --yes option automatically confirms the uninstallation so that the process # doesn’t pause to ask for user confirmation. !pip3 uninstall --yes torch torchaudio torchvision torchtext torchdata # This installs the specified Python packages (torch, torchaudio, torchvision, # torchtext, torchdata).
